content: Case study structure that converts: Problem (vivid, specific, numbers) -> Approach (methodology, alternatives considered, trade-offs made -- this is what demonstrates seniority) -> Impact (measurable results with numbers/percentages/timeframes, e.g. 'eliminated 95% of downtime incidents'). Should be skimmable in ~30 seconds for someone to name problem/approach/outcome. Mention tools/stack and timeline for scope context.
